work_item_contract.acceptance_rule: ACCEPTED requires all dependencies and required children ACCEPTED, result_sha, successful commands, hashed evidence, metrics, reviewers, and verified rollback fields.
work_item_contract.ready_rule: READY requires all dependencies ACCEPTED, a matching integration_head base_sha, and all required locks free.
work_item_contract.progress_rule: Only ACCEPTED FLOW parent weight earns progress. Specialist records are acceptance children with weight fixed at zero and never earn progress independently. Reopened parent work immediately removes its weight.

work_items.title: Freeze and push immutable pose baseline

commands.command: cargo fmt --check; cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings; cargo test --all-targets --all-features (pose tool)
cargo fmt --check; cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings; cargo test --all-targets --all-features (engine)

rollback.instruction: Invalidate P0, block every descendant, and repair/re-verify the immutable pose-v4 baseline in place; never downgrade the pose asset.
